entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, sitting in a high-influence advisory role with Alan

entities.name: Alan
entities.context: Motivated but resource-constrained founder with hiring scars, recently experienced burnout and frustration

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's product, one of the tools available for Alan's hiring needs

entities.name: Corridor X
entities.context: V's network resource, available as a tool alongside Careerspan

entities.name: Free Initial Volume Offer
entities.context: V's willingness to de-risk the experiment by offering the first 100 candidates free

entities.name: Exclusive Recruiter Agreement
entities.context: Alan's existing contractual obligation that creates legal/contractual exposure risk

entities.name: Outsourced/VC-Backed Recruiting Skepticism
entities.context: Alan's skepticism of recruiting solutions that drive up salary expectations or misalign incentives

entities.name: Rapid Experimentation
entities.context: Shared alignment between V and Alan on experimenting quickly while respecting constraints
